comment: Men's Rugby World Cup 2027 (Australia, 1 Oct - 13 Nov 2027). 24 teams, 6 pools of 4. Pool draw held in Sydney on 3 Dec 2025; all 24 places filled (Samoa took the final spot via the Dubai FQT, Nov 2025). Source: World Rugby / RWC.com draw result; ESPN 3 Dec 2025; Wikipedia '2027 Men's Rugby World Cup'.

seeding_bands.comment: World Rugby Men's Rankings at the end of the Nov 2025 internationals; four bands of six drawn one-per-pool. Australia (band 2 by ranking) was pre-allocated to Pool A as host.
